description: Deep understanding that penetrates surface appearances; seeing into the nature of things. 'Worae' names the moment of clarity—when confusion parts and truth appears.
sound_symbolism: The word sees deeply. 'Wo' wonders with penetrating gaze, looking within. 'Ra' radiates with understanding spreading, clarity dawning. Then 'e' opens to received knowledge.
grammatical_notes: Functions as noun: 'lo worae' (the insight). What 'hiru' (intuit) accesses directly. Related to 'weru' (truth) as seeing to seen.

pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Vipassana—insight meditation, the practice of seeing things as they are.
pillars.peace-linguistics-practices: Insightful listening—hearing beneath words to what is truly being communicated.
